title: [FIRRTL/LowerToHW] Make use of unused generated random bits
body:
We currently generate this in the MulDiv module in RocketCore.fir:

```
      _T_18 = `RANDOM;        // Multiplier.scala:47:16
        req_fn = _T_18[3:0];    // Multiplier.scala:47:16
        _T_19 = `RANDOM;        // Multiplier.scala:47:16
        req_dw = _T_19[0];      // Multiplier.scala:47:16
 ```

The RANDOM macro generates 32-bits of random stuff.  The second use of RANDOM isn't necessary, it could just grab bit 4 out of _T_18.
